analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet reports that the Nobel Peace Prize was awarded to the UN World Food Programme and that Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov congratulated WFP's Executive Director. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system) – not present; no mention of multipolarity or alternative frameworks. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – partially aligned, as Russia’s FM offering congratulations to a UN humanitarian body projects a supportive, cooperative, and benevolent image. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – not referenced. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – not claimed; no boasting of achievements. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature) – not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3 by portraying Russia as a supportive, benevolent actor toward an international humanitarian effort.
